features: From Aurora's highly popular Sea Sparkles Mermaid Collection

description: Product Description Sea Sparkles is Aurora's fabulous range of Mermaids. Every Mermaid is expertly made with exquisite detailing. Daphne's tail is made of a beautiful purple multi-coloured fabric and is moveable for added play value. She has gorgeous purple coloured hair and is sure to appeal to children of all ages. Create your own adventures in the Sea Sparkles World. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
